generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface connecting to crane controllers for data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "System-generated data stored in TimescaleDB for temporal analysis and retrieval"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Logging Application that logs data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance tracking based on historical data"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operations"
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control decisions for crane operations"
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model accuracy validation against physical data"
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly identification through fault detection"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator Service for path computation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryInsight
]

instance TrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Path computation for optimal crane movement"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of gantry crane used for path computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization of lab scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model versioning using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersioningInsight
]

instance ModelVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking model versions for digital twin development"
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for dissemination of digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DisseminationService
]

instance DisseminationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dissemination of digital twin using containerization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DisseminationInsight
]

instance DisseminationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Distribution of digital twin via containerization"
]

instance CartMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor managing cart movement with associated controller"
]

instance HoistingMotionMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor managing hoisting motion with associated controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for container pickup, constrained by mechanical limits and safety interlocks"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with controller, designed for research and educational purposes in controlled laboratory environment; open-source, reproducible, suitable for validating digital twin methodologies like continuous validation, fault detection, and system evolution notation (DarTwin)"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCrane, CartMovementMotor, HoistingMotionMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends movement commands (e.g., target positions and velocities) to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates these into controller-specific commands for the physical crane. The Trajectory Generator Service provides optimized trajectories for movement, which the Control Application executes. Feedback from the physical crane is monitored by the Continuous Validation Service, which compares simulated and actual trajectories and triggers alerts if discrepancies exceed acceptable thresholds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Uses C4 Model for architecture visualization and description, including context and container diagrams for the gantry crane system components and their relationships."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulated trajectories, calculates distance metrics, and compares values against predefined thresholds to detect discrepancies. This ensures model fidelity through automated error detection and correction mechanisms, with regular validation against physical system data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for signaling between digital twin services via an MQTT Broker."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer, with TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana containerized using Docker. This deployment model utilizes Docker for service isolation and management, though computational, storage, scalability, and availability specifics beyond the PC-based setup are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc integration approach leveraging containerization for deployment, without reliance on a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system applies the C4 Model [5] for standardized software architecture visualization and description, with no additional industry-specific standards explicitly documented for the digital twin."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system utilizes a Continuous Validation Service to monitor operational thresholds; when thresholds are breached, operators are notified via the dashboard to take appropriate action. Fail-safe mechanisms are referenced within the digital twin services."
]
